layout.spacing: Generous (p-6, p-8) for containers, Tight (gap-2, gap-4) for data density
layout.sidebar: Fixed left, collapsible, dark slate background

buttons.primary: bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-500 text-white font-semibold rounded-lg shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(34,197,94,0.4)] transition-all

cards.style: bg-slate-900/50 border border-slate-800/60 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-xl hover:border-green-500/30 transition-colors
cards.kpi: p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.style: bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-800 focus:border-green-500 focus:ring-green-500/20 rounded-md text-white placeholder:text-slate-500

tables.header: text-slate-400 font-medium uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-slate-800 pb-3

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle radial gradients (green/blue) in background for depth, never full screen linear gradients

images.description: Close up of dark green Porsche, excellent for abstract background or hero
Black car in garage, good for service context

assets.icons: Lucide React (default), Phosphor Icons (for detailed automotive icons if needed)

motion.loading: Pulse effect on skeletons, spinning loader for actions

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'Dark Mode First' approach. The app should feel like a cockpit.
Use the 'Deep Navy' (#020617) as the global body background, NOT pure black.
Use 'Electric Green' (#22c55e) sparingly for high-impact actions (CTAs, active states).
For the 'Daily Jobs' list, use the specific status colors defined in the palette.
Ensure the 'Price List' grid matches the structure of the provided asset (Exterior/Interior/Extras columns).
Use 'Manrope' font for all headings to give it that technical automotive look.
KPI Cards should use the 'Tracing Beam' or subtle border glow effect on hover.
All interactive elements must have `data-testid` attributes.
Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors with subtle transparency (glassmorphism).
The 'Shift Calendar' should be dense and clearly visible against the dark background.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - no generic centered layouts.
Create depth with z-index and layered glassmorphism.
